sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16146" key="a)selgopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσελγο-ποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n16146.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">producing licentious persons,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δεκανοί</foreign> Antioch.Astr.in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope> </bibl>).<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">109.13</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
